name: vscode-sorting-attrs
description: Sorting the tag attributes in the specified order
author: Raphaël Balet

enumDescriptions: Code Guide based HTML attribute ordering
Code Guide based ordering plus Angular-specific attribute groups
Code Guide based ordering plus React/JSX-centric attributes
Code Guide based ordering plus Vue directives and shorthand attributes
Code Guide based ordering plus Svelte directives
attrsSorter.framework.description: Framework profile used to derive default attribute order when attrsSorter.order is empty

attrsSorter.sortOnFormat.description: Automatically sort HTML attributes when formatting documents

attrsSorter.order.description: An array of attributes in the correct order

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
